raw.message: Master your Warframe: Dominate the battlefield with skill and strategy.

hook.summary: Visceral combat with a heavy weapon and explosive effects.
hook.visual_action: A red armored warrior slams a giant mace into enemies, triggering green gas clouds.
hook.text_overlay: MATURE 17+ ESRB Blood and Gore Violence In-Game Purchases / Users Interact

scene_flow: Red armored character initiates combat with a massive mace in a city street.
Close-up shots of enemies being defeated with green gas explosions.
The character runs through the environment, showcasing mobility and power.
Final sequence of heavy attacks and environmental traversal.
on_screen_text: MATURE 17+ ESRB Blood and Gore Violence In-Game Purchases / Users Interact
audience_proxy: Hardcore action gamers who enjoy fast-paced, visceral sci-fi combat and power fantasies.
